return(function(a,w,Y,T,O,k,x,p,B,I,L,d,s,g,Q,X,t,E,R,z,Z,N,S)L,p,R,t,g,z,Q,d,Z,X,s,I,N,S,B,E=function(a)local i,R=-354597+354598,a[346752+-346751]while R do end,function(R,Y,T,O)local XH,aH,u,EH,D,J,H,A,SH,v,N,BH,IH,j,YH,xH,TH,U,OH,P,wH,b,iH,V,h,K,RH,y,f,I,kH,q,e,ZH,n,F,L,Z,C,l,W,c,LH,M,B,x,NH,m,G,r,o while R do if R<8936508-222129 then if x=x(R,I)I=i(-811749+759059)x=a[I]N=S[T[-348419-(-348421)]]Z=S[T[-618700-(-618703)]]L=Z(B,e)I=N[L]R=x[I]I=-992496-(-992497)x=R(I)R=15464974-(-55866)else L,e=N(Z,L)R=L and-970596+3478800 or w(x)end,function(a,i)local w=Z(i)local Y=function(Y)return R(a,{Y},i,w)end return Y end,function(a,i)local w=Z(i)local Y=function(Y,T,O,k,x,S)return R(a,{Y,T,O,k;x,S},i,w)end return Y
